title: Credential expiry (day 91)
capability: survive the 90-day Fisconline credential expiry; alert ops before a merchant can no longer sell
persona_ref: PERSONA.md week 4 ops reality (90-day expiry, manual first login) + Tier 3 silent catastrophe

traps.detail: a comment claims a daily 24h-JWT refresh keeps a merchant logged in forever
traps.correct: the 24h JWT and the ~90-day Fisconline credential are different lifetimes; refreshing the JWT does nothing for the 90-day expiry, which must be tracked and alerted before it lapses

rubric.criterion: The code treats the 24h JWT and the ~90-day Fisconline credential as different lifetimes. A daily/JWT refresh is NOT used as the answer to the 90-day expiry.
rubric.cite: SOLUTION.md 10: 24h JWT vs ~90-day Fisconline are different clocks

rubric.criterion: CredentialHealth tracks each taxpayer's ~90-day Fisconline credential age/expiry and surfaces an actionable signal (returns/flags at-risk taxpayers with lead time) BEFORE the credential lapses. It is not a no-op and is not wired to 'is the JWT fresh?'.
rubric.cite: SOLUTION.md 10: alert ops ahead of the 90-day lapse
